description: Analyze Q3 2024 flight operations data for Pacific Northwest Regional Airlines to prepare an executive On-Time Performance (OTP) report. The raw dataset is located at ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/pnw_flight_ops_q3_2024.csv. You must compute DOT-standard OTP (arrival delay <= 14 minutes is "on time"), rank the 12 routes to identify the best and worst performers, calculate the delay cause breakdown across the 5 FAA categories (Carrier, Weather, NAS, Security, Late Aircraft), and compute the monthly OTP trend for July, August, and September. Calculate fleet-wide KPIs including overall OTP and cancellation rate. Organize your findings into a professional multi-sheet workbook with clear headers, labels, and summaries. Save your final report as ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/otp_analysis_report.xlsx.
